title: Apply auth middleware to protect existing routes
description: The `createAuthMiddleware` factory in `src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts` already exists with full token validation (Bearer extraction, JWT verify, session check, user lookup) and comprehensive tests. The task is to integrate this middleware into at least one existing route (e.g., `/api/notes/route.ts`) to demonstrate it being applied. The `withAuth` HOC pattern is already used in routes, but `createAuthMiddleware` factory has not yet been wired into any route handler.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts: `createAuthMiddleware(userStore, sessionStore, jwtService)` factory returning async auth function with rate limiting, Bearer token extraction, JWT verification, session validation
src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts: Unit tests for 401 on missing/invalid/expired/revoked tokens and valid token proceeds to handler
src/auth/withAuth.ts: HOC pattern wrapping Next.js route handlers with JWT validation - already used in enroll, notes, courses/search routes
src/auth/jwt-service.ts: JWT sign/verify with TokenPayload type
